hero.title: DWARF 3
hero.subtitle: Panorama is not just about grandeur, but also about clarity.

portable.label: Dictionary size, lightweight at 1.35kg
portable.title: Travel light, shoot anytime
portable.description:
DWARF 3 is your perfect travel companion, ready to set off with you anytime.
With a body weight of approximately 1.35 kg, it's easy to take along for travel, camping, or weekend trips.

billionPixel.label: Explore the World in Gigapixels
billionPixel.title: Everything in an instant, captured in a single photo
billionPixel.description: Experience billion-pixel panoramic shooting! One photo captures both the macro and the details simultaneously. Even when zoomed in or cropped, it still reveals astonishing clarity.

shootMode.label: Two shooting modes
shootMode.title: Frame, shoot, that's all
shootMode.description: Simply frame the landscape you want to shoot in the App to generate a panoramic preview. One-click shooting, what you see is what you get!
shootMode.altDescription: Of course, if you are familiar with the shooting parameters, you can also directly set the shooting rows and columns, and let DWARF automatically shoot for you.

seamlessStitch.label: Seamless splicing
seamlessStitch.title: As seamless as the real world
seamlessStitch.description: DWARF 3 can precisely control the smooth movement of the lens, ensuring accuracy at every shooting position. The server will utilize algorithms to automatically complete the stitching process. Without complex post-processing, you can obtain a perfect panoramic image!

panoramaMosaic.label: Panoramic Puzzle
panoramaMosaic.title: Zoom in to see the world
panoramaMosaic.description: Panoramic stitching is performed in the cloud, synthesizing a series of telephoto burst shots into a single ultra-clear, wide-angle panorama. No local processing is required; simply capture and upload.
panoramaMosaic.mosaicDescription:
Capture the grand billion-pixel scene and enjoy a panoramic view.
Supports ultra-large format output and extreme magnification for close-up observation of breathtaking scenery.

share.label: Lossless Quality Sharing
share.title: Share, Without Restrictions
share.description:
After panoramic photos are uploaded to the cloud and stitched together, a high-definition panoramic link supporting deep zoom can be generated. Share it to any platform with one click, allowing more people to enjoy the same scenery together.

Multiple independent links can be generated from the same panorama; each link can be individually set with color styles and display information, adapting to different scenarios such as social sharing and personal collection.

appFeatures.mainDescription: NFC quick connection, multilingual support, continuous background shooting, IP54 protection—making outdoor activities more relaxed and shooting more seamless.

nfc.label: Connect instantly, start shooting immediately
nfc.title: NFC one-touch connection
nfc.description: Place your phone near the light ring area to quickly connect to DWARF 3 and start shooting immediately.

multiLanguage.title: Multilingual App
multiLanguage.description: Covering global users, it now supports 10 languages including Chinese, English, Japanese, Spanish, and German.

background.title: Offline automatic operation
background.description: Even if the app is minimized to the background or the connection is interrupted, DWARF 3 continues to run, allowing you to return and check the progress at any time.

ip54.title: IP54 Protection
ip54.description: Dustproof and dew-resistant, providing extra protection for observation and photography, making outdoor use more reassuring.

moreFun.label: More Fun
moreFun.title: Astronomy & Bird Photography
moreFun.description: From astrophotography and ultra-clear panoramas to bird watching and tracking, one device makes observation and recording simpler.

astronomy.title: Astronomy
astronomy.description:
One-click automated shooting makes exploring the universe easier than ever.
Capture images of galaxies, nebulae, star clusters, and more in just minutes.

birding.title: Automatically locks onto the target and continuously tracks it.
birding.description:
After identifying the target, DWARF 3 automatically locks on and continuously tracks.
Even if it suddenly takes off, the dual-camera system quickly repositions, steadily keeping up.
